// note: Composite-project solution root. Run `tsc -b` from code/ to build the atlas-owned type graph (basemap, data, geo, tools, cli). atlas-app and realtime are intentionally NOT referenced here because they are non-composite leaf consumers (atlas-app: noEmit + Vite; realtime: Phase 5 stub). Vendored Excalidraw packages (common/element/excalidraw/math/utils) are also NOT referenced — their src has internal cycles (utils <-> element <-> excalidraw) that prevent composite. Vendored remains path-resolved via tsconfig.base.json `paths`. To typecheck atlas-app, run `cd apps/atlas-app && tsc --noEmit` — its own `references` block resolves atlas-owned types via project refs.
